name: The Fabled Behilmoth
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>轟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ベヒルモス
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can discard 2 or more "Fabled" monsters, including this card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Fabled" Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck whose Level equals the discarded monsters' total original Levels (this is treated as a Synchro Summon). If a card(s) is sent from your hand to the GY, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card; Special Summon 1 "Fabled" monster from your hand. You can only use each effect of "The Fabled Behilmoth" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "The Fabled Behilmoth" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Synchro Summon
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
